message:
Switch asupersync to local path dep and add crates-io patch overrides

Point asupersync workspace dependency to local /dp/asupersync path for
development iteration. Add [patch.crates-io] entries for asupersync,
asupersync-macros, franken-kernel, franken-evidence, and franken-decision
to resolve all transitive references through the local workspace.

Cargo.lock updated accordingly: deduplicates the previously dual
local+registry asupersync entries, and all downstream crates (fastmcp-*,
sqlmodel-*, fsqlite-*) now resolve through the single patched source.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
